message:
test(mouse-dispatcher): add 19 unit tests for bd-iuvb.17.2

Comprehensive test coverage for the central mouse dispatcher:
- Drag lifecycle (pending → dragging → idle, threshold enforcement)
- Click activation (Down+Up cycle, Up-only, right-click rejection)
- Palette dismissal priority
- Hover coalescing (same-target suppression)
- Overlay click handlers (help, debug, perf_hud, a11y close)
- Status bar toggles (help, palette, debug, perf, a11y on/off)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
